column11: Remark
Read the version number of the MCU(coprocessor), read data 1: version number
Control RGB color，data 1：R，data 2：G，data 3：B
Data 1: Default mode=0, K1 button is to reset the robot arm; mode=1, study mode, press K1 button to study action, RGB light will become breathing light in study mode
Main board：01：STC51，02：STM32，03：microbit，04：arduino，05：raspberryPi，06：jetsonNano，07：Other
Restart MCU

Control the buzzer, 
data 1:=0: turn off the buzzer,=0xff: turn on the buzzer,=1: buzzer whistle for 0.1 second, =2: buzzer whistle for 0.2 second.... 
Maximum value=50, turn on the buzzer and sound for 5 seconds.

Control a single servo, 
data 1: high 8-bit data of the servo position, data 2: low 8-bit data of the servo position, the two data together are the position data of the servo, the range is: 96-4000.
data 3: high 8-bit data of running time high data, data 4: low 8-bit data of running time high data, the two data together are the running time,  the default is 500 (500 milliseconds), and 0 means the fastest speed.

Control all servos at the same time, 
data 1: high 8-bit data of the servo position, data 2: low 8-bit data of the servo position, the two data together are the position data of the servo, the range is: 96-4000.
data 3: high 8-bit data of running time high data, data 4: low 8-bit data of running time high data, the two data together are the running time,  the default is 500 (500 milliseconds), and 0 means the fastest speed.
Set the ID number of the servo. When this command is executed, all the connected bus servos will be set to the same ID number.

Control thespecific ID servo:
data 1: high 8-bit data of the servo position, data 2: low 8-bit data of the servo position, the two data together are the position data of the servo, the range is: 96-4000.
data 3: high 8-bit data of running time high data, data 4: low 8-bit data of running time high data, the two data together are the running time,  the default is 500 (500 milliseconds), and 0 means the fastest speed.
Bus servo torque switch: 0 is closed, !0 is open

column1: Read the status of the neutral deviation setting of the bus servo
column11:
Read data 1: 
0 means not set, 1 means it has been written into flash, 2 means it exceeds the adjustment range. 
It must be read immediately after setting the median deviation, the status will be cleared after reading or 1.5 s.

column1: Set the median deviation of the bus servo
column11:
0: restore the default, 1-6 is the ID of the servo,  it be used to set the median value of the bus servo, 
the default median of No.1-No.4 servo is 2000±400, 
the default position of No. 5 servo is 1486±300, 
 the default position of No. 6 servois 3100 ±400
column12: The median value of each servo is stored in the flash fixed address, each time the angle value is sent, the median deviation value needs to be added, and then the angle data is output to the servo

column4: Write 12 data（S1_H, S1_L, S2_H, S2_L.....S6_H, S6_L）
column11: Send the angle data of 6 servos at the same time, from S1 to S6, with the high 8 bits in the front and the low 8 bits in the back.

column1: Control the running time of 6 bus servos
column11: Combine with the 0x1D register, write 0x1e first,then write 0x1d to control the running time of the servo

column5: The high 8 bits of the servo running time
column6: The low 8 bits of the servo running time
column7: The high 8 bits of the action group interval time
column8: The low 8 bits of the action group interval time
column11: Write data 1: 0: stop motion, 1: run once, 2:  run in loop

column1: View the number of current action groups
column11: Read data 1: Calculate the number of learned action

column1: Read the position of bus servo 1
column11: First, write a value (0x01) to the corresponding register, add a delay (5ms). Then, read it two data, the return value is the angle data val of the servo, the high 8 bit in the front, the low 8 bits in the back. the range of val: 96~4000

column1: Read the position of bus servo 2
Read the position of bus servo 3
Read the position of bus servo 4
Read the position of bus servo 5
Read the position of bus servo 6
Read the position of specific bus servo
column11: Read the position data of the specified  ID servo, read two data, the return value is the angle data val of the servo,  the high 8 bit in the front, the low 8 bits in the back. the range of val: 96~4000

column1: Read the state of the specified servo
column11: Read the status of the designated ID servo: Data 1: Value = 0x00 means no detection or no data of the corresponding servo is read, = 0xda (218) means the state is normal, = 0x01 other abnormal states

Control the angle of a single PWM servo: 
data 1 is the angle value of the servo (0-180)

Control the angle of all PWM servos: 
data 1 is the angle value of the servo (0-180)

column3: Raspberry Pi or jetson nano enters network configuration mode
Open BootLoader, support to update the firmware of the MCU(coprocessor) through the serial port
